---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format: 
  html:
    css: custom.css
toc: false
---

<div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 50px;">
  ![](images/Me.png){width="60%" style="border-radius: 15px; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"}
</div>

::: {layout-ncol=3 style="text-align: center;"}
::: {#linkedin}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin" style="font-size: 3rem; color:  #fa70ff;"></i>](https://www.linkedin.com/in/veronica-pletsch-a49331100/)
<br>**LinkedIn**
:::

::: {#github}
[<i class="bi bi-github" style="font-size: 3rem; color: #fa70ff;"></i>](https://github.com/vmpletsch)
<br>**GitHub**
:::

::: {#email}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope-fill" style="font-size: 3rem; color:  #fa70ff;"></i>](mailto:vmpletsch@gmail.com)
<br>**Email**
:::
:::
